---
title: "External Validation"
---

## Cross-Network NTU Validation

The strongest test of generalization: 260 sites from 6 non-USGS monitoring networks using NTU sensors (not FNU). The model has never seen these sites, these sensors, or these organizations during training.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| label: fig-external-validation
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")
from _scripts.figures import make_external_validation

fig = make_external_validation(
    Path("dashboard_data/ext_external_predictions.parquet"),
    Path("dashboard_data/ext_external_validation_summary.json"),
)
fig.show()
```
